description: Set up working environment: install current dependencies and verify baseline lint and build pass before making changes.
steps: Run: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Danielle-s-Blog && npm ci
Run: npm run lint:check -- confirm it passes cleanly
Run: npm run build -- confirm the build succeeds
acceptance_criteria: npm run lint:check passes with exit code 0
npm run build passes with exit code 0
verification: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Danielle-s-Blog && npm ci && npm run lint:check && npm run build
findings: All baseline checks pass on Node v22.22.3 (npm 11.4.2). npm ci installed 858 packages (2 audit vulnerabilities - 1 low, 1 high - unrelated to eslint). lint:check and build both exit 0. tsconfck deprecation warning is cosmetic only.
